post.title: WebTestBench: Can AI Agents Actually Test Web Applications?
post.description: A new benchmark evaluates 10 AI models on end-to-end web testing. The best achieves only 26% F1. Here's what that means for QA teams and engineering leaders.
post.excerpt: I just finished reading WebTestBench: Evaluating Computer-Use Agents towards End-to-End Automated Web Testing by Fanheng Kong, Jingyuan…
